_comment: Veilborn item definitions. Add new items here — no code changes required.

oak_log.name: Oak Log
oak_log.description: A sturdy log from an oak tree. Essential for woodworking.

pine_log.name: Pine Log
pine_log.description: Lightweight pine wood. Burns well and smells of resin.

iron_ore.name: Iron Ore
iron_ore.description: Raw iron ore. Must be smelted before use.

iron_ingot.name: Iron Ingot
iron_ingot.description: Refined iron. The backbone of smithing.

gold_ore.name: Gold Ore
gold_ore.description: Gleaming gold ore from deep veins.

coal.name: Coal
coal.description: A chunk of coal. Useful as fuel for smelting.

mithril_ore.name: Mithril Ore
mithril_ore.description: A rare silvery ore with magical resonance. Requires expert mining.

iron_sword.name: Iron Sword
iron_sword.description: A reliable iron longsword. Well-balanced for both attack and defense.
iron_sword.lore: Standard issue for the Ironmarch city guard.

iron_shield.name: Iron Shield
iron_shield.description: A sturdy iron shield. Reduces incoming damage significantly.

iron_helmet.name: Iron Helmet
iron_helmet.description: A solid iron helmet that protects the head from blows.

iron_chestplate.name: Iron Chestplate
iron_chestplate.description: Heavy iron plate covering the torso. Essential for frontline fighters.

iron_legs.name: Iron Greaves
iron_legs.description: Iron leg protection. Heavy but reliable.

mithril_sword.name: Mithril Blade
mithril_sword.description: A razor-thin sword forged from legendary mithril. Unnaturally light.
mithril_sword.lore: Mithril hums faintly with ancient dwarven runes.

hunters_bow.name: Hunter's Bow
hunters_bow.description: A well-crafted recurve bow favored by rangers and scouts.

wizard_staff.name: Apprentice Staff
wizard_staff.description: A gnarled staff tipped with a faintly glowing orb.

health_potion.name: Health Potion
health_potion.description: A crimson vial that restores 50 HP when consumed.

mana_potion.name: Mana Potion
mana_potion.description: A sapphire-blue vial that restores 40 mana.

antidote.name: Antidote
antidote.description: Cures poison and disease. Bitter to taste, lifesaving in effect.

cooked_meat.name: Roasted Meat
cooked_meat.description: Properly cooked meat. Restores stamina and provides a minor HP regen buff.

wildroot.name: Wildroot
wildroot.description: A common herb used in basic alchemy. Slightly bitter smell.

moonpetal.name: Moonpetal
moonpetal.description: A rare flower that blooms only at night. Prized by alchemists.

firebloom.name: Firebloom
firebloom.description: A flame-red flower found near volcanic vents. Extremely hot to touch.

wolf_pelt.name: Wolf Pelt
wolf_pelt.description: Thick fur from a forest wolf. Used in crafting warm gear.

dragon_scale.name: Dragon Scale
dragon_scale.description: Near-indestructible scale from a slain dragon. Legendary crafting material.
dragon_scale.lore: Hot to the touch even years after the dragon's death.

travelers_ring.name: Traveler's Ring
travelers_ring.description: A simple enchanted band that reduces fatigue from long journeys.

iron_amulet.name: Iron Amulet
iron_amulet.description: A simple iron amulet worn by common soldiers for good luck.

explorer_map.name: Ancient Explorer's Map
explorer_map.description: A weathered map marking the location of a lost dungeon. One use.

guild_charter.name: Guild Charter
guild_charter.description: An official document granting rights to found a guild.

magmatite_core.name: Magmatite Core
magmatite_core.description: A volcanic ore that burns with inner heat. Rare and highly sought.

frostite_shard.name: Frostite Shard
frostite_shard.description: A crystalline fragment from the deep tundra. Radiates cold.
